main.description: A live audio room announced by an ATProto repository and transported by LiveKit.

livekitRoom.description: LiveKit room identifier used for media transport.

serviceEndpoint.description: Base URL of the host's deployment. Clients join media via <serviceEndpoint>/api/token, so a room is reachable across instances.

openMic.description: When true, participants join able to speak; when absent or false, they join as listeners and request to speak.

lastActiveAt.description: Host heartbeat. Clients may treat a live room with a stale lastActiveAt as ended.

hosts.description: DIDs allowed to administer the room.
